purpose: A generic option element used inside Select, ComboBox, MultiComboBox, and other selection controls. Represents a single choice with a key and a text label. Never used standalone; always inside a parent selection control.
whenToUse: As an option in a Select or ComboBox
As a composed sub-item — parent handles rendering
whenNotToUse: As a standalone visible node — Item has no independent rendering
For interactive rows in a list — use StandardListItem
For form values — use Input or the appropriate typed control
As a Menu entry — use MenuListItem
doRules: Set the 'text' property to a human-readable label
Group related items with GroupHeaderListItem in the same parent
dontRules: Do not use Item outside a supported parent (Select/ComboBox/MultiComboBox)
Do not put long descriptions in the text property
Do not skip the key property — it is required for tracking
Do not duplicate keys within the same parent

contentGuidance.contentRules: Plain text label; no formatting or icons

responsiveBehavior.S: Same — parent handles overall responsive behavior

requirements: Screen reader announces label + selection state

forbiddenWith: Any parent other than the above
